nodes.label: T01 GUI Orchestrator View
nodes.description: Wire the sidebar nav so the design dashboard switches live panel state from repo-backed data instead of visual-only clicks.
nodes.verification_reason: sidebar navigation routes between dashboard panels from repo-backed hooks

nodes.label: T02 GUI DAG View
nodes.description: Make DAG rows open live task details, dependencies, allowed paths, and verification reasons from repo state.
nodes.verification_reason: task DAG rows are still visual-only and do not open task details

nodes.label: T03 GUI Spawn Loop
nodes.description: Wire the spawn loop controls to a real Flask control plane so start, pause, and related actions work from the GUI.
nodes.verification_reason: spawn loop controls are not wired to a control endpoint

nodes.label: T04 GUI Training Run
nodes.description: Make the Training Run section open live training-run details, status, and artifacts from canonical repo state.
nodes.verification_reason: training run panel is not wired to detailed repo-backed training state

nodes.label: T05 GUI Dataset
nodes.description: Make the Dataset section open live dataset details, formats, counts, and export-ready state from canonical repo data.
nodes.verification_reason: dataset panel is not wired to detailed repo-backed dataset state

nodes.label: T06 GUI ETA Tracker
nodes.description: Make the ETA Tracker section render live ETA thresholds and progress tiers from canonical repo-backed planning state.
nodes.verification_reason: ETA tracker is not wired to canonical repo-backed ETA detail rendering

nodes.label: T07 GUI Scale Analysis
nodes.description: Make the Scale Analysis nav/page a fully tracked GUI function with repo-backed scale recommendations, storage thresholds, and fine-tune viability guidance.
nodes.verification_reason: no verification rule

nodes.label: T08 GUI Audit Log
nodes.description: Make the audit log panel open detailed repo-backed audit events instead of a single summary card.
nodes.verification_reason: audit log panel is not wired to detailed audit events

nodes.label: T09 GUI Repo Freeze
nodes.description: Wire the repo freeze toggle to a real Flask control endpoint so the dashboard can mutate live freeze state.
nodes.verification_reason: repo freeze toggle is display-only and has no control endpoint

nodes.label: T10 GUI Stray Monitor
nodes.description: Make the stray monitor panel open detailed repo-backed stray event history and diagnostics.
nodes.verification_reason: stray monitor panel is not wired to detailed stray events

nodes.label: T11 GUI Trace Capture
nodes.description: Make the Trace Capture section open detailed trace history and artifact views from repo-backed logs and iterations.
nodes.verification_reason: trace capture section is not wired to detailed repo-backed trace history

nodes.label: T12 GUI Steering Log
nodes.description: Make the Steering Log section open detailed steering-event history and reasoning from repo-backed decision artifacts.
nodes.verification_reason: steering log section is not wired to detailed repo-backed steering events

nodes.label: T13 GUI Bootstrap Step Details
nodes.description: Make bootstrap rows open live step details and status sourced from repo state.
nodes.verification_reason: bootstrap steps are clickable shells without drilldown behavior

nodes.label: T14 GUI Repo Structure Details
nodes.description: Make repo structure rows clickable with live detail panels backed by actual repo paths and state.
nodes.verification_reason: repo structure panel has no clickable node drilldowns

nodes.label: T15 GUI Vector Phase Details
nodes.description: Make vector phase rows open repo-backed phase details instead of acting like decorative cards.
nodes.verification_reason: vector memory phases are not wired to drilldowns

nodes.label: T16 GUI Memory File Open
nodes.description: Make memory file rows open real repo file details and context instead of static labels.
nodes.verification_reason: memory file rows are not wired to repo-backed file details

nodes.label: T17 GUI Export JSONL
nodes.description: Wire the JSONL export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits repo-backed export output.
nodes.verification_reason: JSONL export is not wired to repo-backed export logic

nodes.label: T18 GUI Export Alpaca
nodes.description: Wire the Alpaca export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits canonical dataset output.
nodes.verification_reason: Alpaca export is not wired to repo-backed export logic

nodes.label: T19 GUI Export ShareGPT
nodes.description: Wire the ShareGPT export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits conversation-format data.
nodes.verification_reason: ShareGPT export is not wired to repo-backed export logic

nodes.label: T20 GUI Export Steering
nodes.description: Wire the steering-only export button to a real Flask endpoint that emits steering traces only.
nodes.verification_reason: Steering-only export is not wired to repo-backed export logic

nodes.label: T21 GUI Readiness Tracker
nodes.description: Replace the static readiness tracker rows with canonical repo-backed readiness rendering.
nodes.verification_reason: readiness tracker is still mostly static text and not a live function surface

nodes.label: T22 GUI Mutex Lock
nodes.description: Make the mutex status box open detailed live lock ownership, expiry, and gating state from repo-backed lock files.
nodes.verification_reason: mutex status box is not wired to detailed live lock state

nodes.label: T23 GUI Model Status Panel
nodes.description: Make the full model status surface a first-class tracked GUI function with explicit repo-backed readiness, graph rendering, and training-scale state.
nodes.verification_reason: no verification rule
